subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and art mentioned before the Throne! Say: My God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having remembered me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و المذکور لدی العرش قل الهی الهی لک الحمد بما ذکرتنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @pain of love; love as veil, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
